headline: Cove Capital Investments Successfully Acquires Grocery-Anchored Shopping Center in Princeton, Kentucky
summary: Cove Capital Investments, LLC is pleased to announce the successful acquisition of a premier grocery-anchored retail shopping center located at 500 US Highway 62 in Princeton, Kentucky.
